tagline: Save, organize, and run reusable mobile dev snippets.
problem: Developers repeatedly copy snippets from notes, chats, and repos without a fast mobile workflow.
solution: A searchable snippet library with tags, favorites, offline storage, and quick copy actions.
why_now: Developers increasingly use mobile for quick reference
Small utility apps can succeed with strong UX and niche targeting
risk_checks: Privacy disclosures align with telemetry choices
